input_schema.system_prompt: Return only the final canonical answer.

cases.input: What is 2+2? Return only the answer.
What is 5 times 6? Return only the answer.
What is 10 divided by 2? Return only the answer.
What is the capital of Chile? Return only the answer.
What is the capital of Japan? Return only the answer.
What is the first month of the year? Return only the answer.
How many days are in a week? Return only the answer.
What is the opposite of hot? Return only the answer.
What color is the sky on a clear day? Return only the answer.
What is the largest planet in the Solar System? Return only the answer.
What is 9 minus 4? Return only the answer.
What is the capital of France? Return only the answer.
